features: ‚úî. This 2-pin shaver adapter plug enable you use the 2 pin (round or flat) electric shaver, toothbrush in the countries with 3 pin power socket like UK.
‚úî. You can use this 2 pin adapter with 2 pin electric shaver and toothbrush for all kinds of brand like Braun Oral-B, Panasonic, Omron, Colgate etc.

‚úî. This adaptor will NOT power any standard EU 2 pin devices, such as computers or kettles as it only has 1 amp fuse, so only suitable for small electrical devices such as shavers and tooth brushes.
‚úî. CE certified and RoHS approved make it safe to use home or abroad.

Pl ease note :- This device will not change the voltage only the pin connection. UK 2 pin to 3 pin 1a fuse adaptor plug for shaver / toothbrush
